title: Access Bank Appoints Uche Orji as Independent Non-Executive Director - FinancialEDGE
description: Access Holdings Plc has announced the appointment of renowned investment banking professional, Mr. Uche Orji, as an Independent Non-Executive Director of its flagship subsidiary, Access Bank Plc. The appointment, which takes effect from January 7, 2025, has been approved by the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) and reflects the bank's commitment to enhancing its governance
html:
Access Holdings Plc has announced the appointment of renowned investment banking professional, Mr. Uche Orji, as an Independent Non-Executive Director of its flagship subsidiary, Access Bank Plc.

The appointment, which takes effect from January 7, 2025, has been approved by the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) and reflects the bank’s commitment to enhancing its governance practices and ensuring a diverse and experienced board.

Mr. Orji brings over three decades of professional and board experience to the role, having worked with top financial institutions such as Goldman Sachs, JP Morgan, and UBS Securities. He is also the Co-founder and Partner of Titangate Capital Management and the Founder and Director of Vitesse Africa Limited.

Commenting on the appointment, Mr. Paul Usoro, SAN, Chairman of the Bank, said: “Mr. Orji’s exceptionally rich professional, academic, and corporate board experience will be invaluable to the Bank as we continue to pursue our strategic objectives.”

The appointment is seen as a strategic move to further strengthen the bank’s governance and decision-making processes, as it continues to pursue its goal of becoming one of the top 5 African Banks.
